basic_details.job_title: NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Statistician, Programme Co-ordinator and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)

qualification.education_qualification: MD/DNB in Psychiatry, MSc/PhD in Biostatistics/Statistics
qualification.details: Programme Co-ordinator (Psychiatry) (Senior Resident Equivalent): MD/DNB in Psychiatry Senior Statistician: MSc in Biostatistics/statistics/applied statistics/medical statistics/health statistics or PhD in Biostatistics/statistics Statistician: MSc in Biostatistics/statistics/applied statistics/medical statistics/health statistics or PhD in Biostatistics/statistics or any relevant subjects

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,25,000/- to Rs.1,35,000/- (Programme Co-ordinator); Rs.70,000/- (Senior Statistician); Rs.65,000/- (Statistician)
salary_details.details: Programme Co-ordinator (Psychiatry) (Senior Resident Equivalent): Rs.1,25,000/- (without post-MD experience); Rs.1,35,000/- (having one year or more post-MD academic experience) Senior Statistician: Rs.70,000/- Consolidated Statistician: Rs.65,000/- Consolidated

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the NIMHANS recruitment is scheduled for 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Programme Co-ordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Programme Co-ordinator (Psychiatry) post, candidates must possess an MD/DNB in Psychiatry. For other statistician roles, an MSc or PhD in Statistics or related fields is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for these NIMHANS posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 35 years as of the application deadline. Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Programme Co-ordinator post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Programme Co-ordinator (Psychiatry) post is Rs.1,25,000/- per month for those without post-MD experience and Rs.1,35,000/- per month for those with one year or more post-MD academic experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in-cum-Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available in this NIMHANS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Programme Co-ordinator (Psychiatry) and related statistician posts.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the NIMHANS office in Bengaluru, Karnataka. The exact address and reporting time will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis. Candidates will be appointed for a specific tenure as per the project requirements.
